message:
chore: refresh Cargo.lock against upstream dependency bumps

Lock-file regeneration after upstream version bumps in transitive
dependencies (foldhash 0.1.5 → 0.2.0, lru, smallvec pulled into
fsqlite-btree, asupersync added to fsqlite-mvcc). No Cargo.toml
changes in this repo — picked up via `cargo update` when other repos
in the workspace bumped their requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 ]
